sub_modules.conv1d_window: Purely combinational tap-window mapper that exposes current input and four delayed samples as FIR operands.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac: Purely combinational fixed 5-tap multiply-accumulate block using coefficients [2, 8, 12, 8, 2].
sub_modules.conv1d_normalize: Purely combinational normalization block that right-shifts the MAC result by GAIN_W to produce the extended output sample.
